lines.name: Central
lines.reason: Central Line: Minor delays due to train cancellations.

lines.name: Piccadilly
lines.reason: Piccadilly Line: Severe delays between Acton Town and Heathrow Terminals, and MINOR DELAYS between Cockfosters and Acton Town westbound only while we fix a signal failure at South Ealing. Tickets being accepted on London Buses and Elizabeth Line. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.

lines.name: Mildmay
lines.reason: Mildmay Line: Severe delays while we fix a signal failure at Gospel Oak. London Underground accepting tickets via any reasonable routes.

lines.name: Suffragette
lines.reason: Suffragette Line: Severe delays while we fix a signal failure at Gospel Oak. London Underground accepting tickets via any reasonable routes.

lines.name: Weaver
lines.reason: Weaver Line: Minor delays due to a line side fire near Wood Street on Sunday.
